description: v2.4: First run testing freeze_train + distill_train + lora_train in one job

distill_train.note: Same results as freeze — shares dataset_iter1, different labels not regenerated

round1_decisions: distill_train (chose 11) — Brain said: 'try distill_train to address forgetting'
lora_train (chose 12) — Brain said: 'try lora_train to address forgetting'
LoRA injected into 5 Conv2d layers (2.32% params), trained 50 epochs

conclusion: First successful run testing all 3 anti-forgetting methods. Brain autonomously chose to try each one after seeing previous results. LoRA training succeeded (2.32% params) but evaluate was not reached before round end. freeze_train and distill_train both show old_f1=0.893 (still forgetting). All methods tested on same consensus labels (85 boxes + 3537 old).
